name: cursor-direnv
description: Install Cursor hooks that run Shell commands through direnv.

scripts.lint: node --check bin/cursor-direnv.mjs src/hooks/pretooluse-direnv.mjs src/commands/install.mjs src/commands/uninstall.mjs src/lib/direnv.mjs src/lib/hooks-json.mjs src/lib/io.mjs src/lib/paths.mjs test/unit/hooks-json.test.mjs test/unit/pretooluse-direnv.test.mjs test/integration/install.test.mjs test/integration/uninstall.test.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run test && npm pack --dry-run
